caption: The video features a man standing behind a microphone, addressing an audience. He is wearing glasses and a white shirt with a black vest adorned with decorative patterns. The man appears to be speaking or singing into the microphone while holding a small drum in his hands. His expression suggests he is engaged in delivering a message or performance. The setting seems to be indoors, possibly in a classroom or auditorium, as indicated by the wooden blinds in the background and the presence of children in the foreground. The logo "ORCA" is visible in the bottom right corner, hinting that this might be part of an educational or cultural event organized by the organization.
